input:
The backstory:

I rolled in my mom's car in the desert on May 23rd, 2014. Me, my friend and mother were all involved.

Luckily, I got the worst of the aesthetic injuries, but my mother broke her neck and had a stroke and such. She made a full recovery and is walking/talking to this day. My friend walked away with cuts and bruises. Everything in the car (electronics, clothes, laptops) survived, except the car itself. I'm extremely lucky that I walked away with an almost missing arm only. Don't know what caused the split though, whether it was just pressure from the car on top of it, or if it was a shard of glass tearing through.

I was life flighted to Vegas where I got stitched up. My muscle had torn all the way through (that's all tendon and ligaments), and that had to be sutured, my skin was stapled back together. I got a skin graft about 2 months later and now it's almost fully healed.

More images of the following months [here in this album](<URL>

Rolling in a car is definitely an unreal experience. I constantly dream of the night that it happened, the rolling playing over in my head again and again. Luckily, a doctor and nurse were some of the first to stop and help. Definitely thankful for everyone who helped me.

Oh, and by the way, life flights cost about $44,000 in case you were all wondering. That and all my other bills amounted to ~$150,000 that night. Phew!
label: REJECTED

I broke all of my upper teath in a Parkour accident, the hospital did a very bad job at making them look like they were before it, and in my country this much fake teeths costs dinosaur balls. input: A 24 year-old man was arrested for allegedly sexually assaulting and smothering a 75-year-old woman at Panamadangi in Vellore district of Tamil Nadu on in the early hours of Monday. The woman was staying in a bus stand at Panamadangi after the death of her husband five years ago. Police said the accused, <Person>, who was in an inebriated condition, stopped his two-wheeler behind the bus stand around 12.30am and tried to sexually assault the elderly woman. “The accused covered the woman’s mouth to stop her from raising alarm and tried to rape her. The woman was smothered when he tried to force himself on her,” said Katpadi police inspector <Person>. A woman, who was living opposite to the bus stand, found the youth trying to sexually assault the old woman. She alerted other neighbours.

input:
My group of friends and I want to learn to play the game together. I have a very limited experience of playing about 4 sessions with my uncle, so I understand the combat basics but that's really it. My friends have zero experience, and my uncle has informed me to use 3.5 instead of 4. Here is the campaign setting I'm trying to build for my group, it may sound corny to some, but hey, its my first. I just want to know if the more experienced players think this is too ambitious a campaign for a new group of players. We have all talked and really don't want to use a pre-made adventure because we would like to make it our own. Anyways, here's what I have written so far.

Nivaär Background: Three decades have passed since the official end of the Searing Wars. The land was ravaged and burned, entire countries wiped from existence in the great fires brought forth from the bellies of dragons. Only five kingdoms remain, and while they have a settled for peace, none can be sure how long it will last. Each one is hungry for the resources of the others, and would love nothing more than to turn their former enemies into a slave population.

You are in the city of Nivaär. Once a thriving metropolis has now been reduced to a crumbling kingdom ran by rapist and murders. Under the reign of King <Person>, the kingdom ranked among the strongest of the kingdoms. During the Searing Wars, <Person> took up arms with the neighboring kingdom of Bwelgun and formed the <Organization>, named rightly after the twin swords each king had forged in order to commemorate their new found friendship. However, this alliance proved to be a grave mistake for <Person>. <Person>, king of Bwelgun, became power hungry and saw an opportunity in the form of betrayal. <Person> and his king’s guard surrounded <Person> on the battlefield and executed him on the spot. <Person> then placed his first son, <Person>, on the throne of Nivaär. <Person> has been a ruthless leader, executing people for the sheer joy it brings him to see people suffer. His torture methods haunt the
